intent.name: RIDIE persistence (durable improvements)
intent.description: Adds a sealed persistence adapter so RIDIE improvements (proposals, thresholds, stop-policy tuning) persist across runs via append-only ndjson + state checkpoint. Requires explicit promotion gate to apply proposals.

ops.content:
# RIDIE Persistence Smoke Test (deterministic)
# Run: python validators/ridie_persistence_smoke_test.py
from pathlib import Path
import json, tempfile
from modules.ridie_persistence import RIDIEPersistence

def main():
    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as d:
        root = Path(d)
        rp = RIDIEPersistence(root=root)
        rp.append_proposals([{"id":"p1","kind":"threshold","value":0.9}])
        rp.write_state({"last_stage":"K.2","thresholds":{"compression":0.1}})
        assert rp.proposals_path.exists()
        assert rp.state_path.exists()
        st = rp.load_state()
        assert st["last_stage"]=="K.2"
    print("RIDIE_PERSIST_SMOKE_OK")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

notes_md: Adds persistence for RIDIE proposals; does NOT auto-apply changes. Promotion must be gated and ledgered.
